events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, **high risk**. A hook with a missing or tied-back latch can't retain the sling in the bowl, creating a dropped-load/struck-by hazard — this violates OSHA 1926.251(a)(5) and ASME B30.9/B30.10 latch requirements. Since the work is only staged, the corrective path is to pull the defective hook, replace it with one having a functional latch, verify the latch by function test, and re-inspect the rest of the rigging before staging resumes.
